summary: Iteration 3: Validated new Stripe deposit-payment flow end-to-end. Backend pytest suite for /api/payments/* — 11/11 PASS. Frontend /book page validated: massage selection forces deposit (Pay-at-shop disabled, 'Required' badge shown, 'Pay 500 DOP & Book' CTA); haircut selection keeps both options enabled. /book/success without session_id shows 'Missing session id' error. Admin dashboard still works and correctly displays PENDING_PAYMENT badge. No regressions.
passed_backend: POST /api/appointments with 'Masaje Relajante (60 min)' -> 200, status='pending_payment'; DB row has deposit_required=true, deposit_paid=false, deposit_amount=500.0, deposit_currency='dop'
POST /api/appointments with 'Classic Haircut' -> 200, status='pending'; backend logs immediately show [email skipped] and [sms skipped] WARNING entries
POST /api/appointments with massage does NOT emit email/sms warnings (only 'Massage appointment pending deposit' INFO log)
POST /api/payments/checkout -> 200 with {url, session_id}; url starts with 'https://checkout.stripe.com/'; payment_transactions row inserted with status='initiated', amount=500.0, currency='dop'
POST /api/payments/checkout twice after marking deposit_paid=true manually -> 400 'Deposit already paid for this appointment'
GET /api/appointments without JWT -> 401/403; with admin JWT -> 200 array
passed_frontend: /book loads with deposit-section, pay-now-option, pay-at-shop-option testids
'Classic Haircut' selected -> pay-at-shop ENABLED, no 'Required' badge, pay-at-shop clickable

'Masaje Relajante (60 min)' selected -> pay-at-shop DISABLED (opacity-40 cursor-not-allowed), 'REQUIRED' badge shown on pay-now-option, copy 'Not available for massage services — a deposit is required.' shown, pay-now-option auto-selected with border-primary, submit CTA changes to 'Pay 500 DOP & Book'
/book/success (no session_id) -> renders booking-success-page with 'Missing session id' error and 'Try again' link
Regression: /admin login flow works, dashboard renders 8 appointments, PENDING_PAYMENT status badge shows for massage row
critical_code_review_comments: Appointment Pydantic response model does NOT include deposit_required/deposit_paid/deposit_amount fields (model_config extra='ignore' drops them), so the POST /api/appointments response for a massage hides the deposit context from the frontend. Frontend currently re-derives via /payments/config + service name, which works, but it would be cleaner (and safer against drift) to extend the Appointment model with optional deposit_required: bool, deposit_amount: float, deposit_currency: str so clients can render badges/amounts from the canonical server response.

GET /api/payments/status/{session_id} hits Stripe on every poll (BookingSuccess polls every 2.5s up to 12 times). If a transaction is already paid the endpoint still calls Stripe; consider short-circuiting when tx.payment_status=='paid' to reduce Stripe API load.
BookingSuccess.jsx line 56: `const appt = state.data ? null : null;` is dead code (always null). Safe to delete.

deposit_required() in server.py uses string startswith on a hard-coded MASSAGE_PREFIX. If a new massage-style category is added later (e.g. 'Spa Facial') it won't trigger deposit. Acceptable for current spec but document this assumption near the constant.

STRIPE_API_KEY is a placeholder ('sk_test_emergent'). Stripe Checkout sessions are still being created — verify with main agent that this is the Emergent test-mode key and not a literal string that happens to work; if hard-coding, leave a comment so a future engineer doesn't think it's broken.
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed appointments and payment_transactions; cleanup fixture removes them at module teardown.
mocked_apis_confirmed: Resend email — RESEND_API_KEY empty; backend logs '[email skipped — no RESEND_API_KEY]'. Verified.
Twilio SMS — TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID empty; backend logs '[sms skipped — Twilio not configured]'. Verified.

Stripe Checkout — REAL test-mode (sk_test_emergent). Sessions are created on Stripe servers and the URL starts with https://checkout.stripe.com/. No actual card payment was attempted per instructions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment tests live in /app/backend/tests/test_payments.py (11 tests). They use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL + direct MongoDB access (via MONGO_URL/DB_NAME) to verify deposit_* fields persistence and to manually flip deposit_paid for the 400-already-paid test. Use _future_date() helper (returns >=2026-07-06, avoids Mondays). The Radix Select on /book has 41 service options — programmatic selection of Masaje via clicking testid times out because the option is below the visible scroll area; use Radix's first-letter typeahead: open select, then page.keyboard.type('Masaje Relajante (60', delay=30) then press Enter. BookingSuccess polls /api/payments/status every 2.5s up to 12 attempts.
